data.title: 国际服「Bunny Chasers on Board」活动青辉石礼物
data.summary: [Bunny Chasers on Board Celebration Gift] Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the new eve
data.body:
[Bunny Chasers on Board Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the new event!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 5/10/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))

https://nexon.link/9my
